description:
Document the preparation of a 10x PBS stock solution within the 'Buffer Preparation' experiment of the 'General Lab Support' project. Create a task named 'Prepare 10x PBS Stock' and assign Sodium Chloride (NaCl), Potassium Chloride (KCl), Disodium Phosphate (Na2HPO4), and Monopotassium Phosphate (KH2PO4) from the 'Chemical Storage' inventory to it. Include a text result stating 'QC passed: pH adjusted to 7.4'. Additionally, create a new inventory item named '10x PBS (Batch Mar-26)' in the 'Stock Solutions' inventory.
